                       +-----------+
                   +---+  Node B3  |<-----+
+-----------+      |   +-----------+      |   +-----------+
|  Node C1  |<-----+                      +---+  Node A1  |
+-----------+      |   +-----------+      |   +-----------+
                   +---+  Node B2  |<-----+
+-----------+      |   +-----------+      |   +-----------+
|  Node C2  |<-----+                      +---+  Node A2  |
+-----------+      |   +-----------+      |   +-----------+
                   +---+  Node B1  |<-----+
+-----------+      |   +-----------+      |   +-----------+
|  Node C3  |<-----+                      +---+  Node A3  |
+-----------+                                 +-----------+
